title: coleus betonicifolius
intro: Coleus betonicifolius, also known as the "country borage" or "Indian borage", is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the leaves of Coleus betonicifolius have been used in Ayurvedic medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The leaves of Coleus betonicifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infused in oil for medicinal purposes, and it is also used as a culinary herb in some parts of the world.
